title: Jigsaw
description: An OptiFine alternative that provides its non-performance features, including general customisation and resource pack wizardry
body:
### 🚧 Status note:

Thanks for checking out this pack! **I don't recommend using it** in its current state unfortunately. It's *very* outdated and I don't plan to update it. For a well-maintained alternative, **I'd suggest using [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive) instead**.
